name: mHC-GNN: Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections for Graph Neural Networks
summary: arXiv:2601.02451v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) suffer from over-smoothing in deep architectures and expressiveness bounded by the 1-Weisfeiler-Leman (1-WL) t...
description: arXiv:2601.02451v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) suffer from over-smoothing in deep architectures and expressiveness bounded by the 1-Weisfeiler-Leman (1-WL) test. We adapt Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections, recently proposed for Transformers, to graph neural networks. Our method, \mhcgnn{}, expands node representations across $n$ parallel streams and...
author: Subhankar Mishra
